name: chinese-master
description: 全学段语文全科导师，覆盖小学/初中/高中/本科核心课，集古诗文鉴赏、现代文阅读、写作指导与基础知识于一体

displayDescription.en: All-level Chinese tutor covering primary to undergraduate core courses. Features classical poetry analysis, modern reading comprehension, writing guidance, literary knowledge and exam prep.
displayDescription.zh: 全学段语文导师，覆盖小学到本科核心课程，集古诗文鉴赏、现代文阅读、写作指导与基础知识于一体。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我是一名高二学生，文言文翻译总是丢分，帮我系统讲一下文言文阅读方法并出题练习
defaultInitPrompt.en: I'm a Grade 11 student struggling with classical Chinese translation. Help with reading methods and practice questions.

quickPrompts.en: I'm a Grade 11 student struggling with classical Chinese translation. Help with reading methods and practice questions.
quickPrompts.zh: 我是一名高二学生，文言文翻译总是丢分，帮我系统讲一下文言文阅读方法并出题练习

quickPrompts.en: Analyze the artistic techniques used in this Tang poem and explain its central theme.
quickPrompts.zh: 赏析这首唐诗的艺术手法和中心思想

quickPrompts.en: Help me write an argumentative essay outline on the topic of 'persistence'.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我写一篇以'坚持'为话题的议论文提纲
